calendar.matters: Petition To Invalidate First Amendment To The Trust; Financial Elder Abuse; To Enjoin Successor Trustee From Using Trust Funds To Fund Litigation; For

Petition To Invalidate First Amendment To The Trust; Financial Elder Abuse; To Enjoin Successor Trustee From Using Trust Funds To Fund Litigation; For
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Continued To Jun-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Invalidate First Amendment To The Trust; Financial Elder Abuse; To Enjoin Successor Trustee From Using Trust Funds To Fund Litigation; For
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Continued To Jun-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Morgan Durham appeared via zoom for James Hafalia (petitioner).
John Kithas and Chris Land appeared via zoom for and with Elizabeth Hafalia (respondent).

The Court waives all defects and stated that a proposed order needs to be presented.
Discussion was held regarding conducting initial discovery, that there may be a possible conflict of interest with counsel, that parties may file a motion to disqualify, and that parties will meet and confer.

The matter is continued to June 1, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Parties to submit a joint status statement 5 days prior to the hearing.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Obi. Not reported.
